name: BASEBALL GAME
prompt: A baseball game broadcast shot — person sits in stadium stands in a team jersey, watching the field and posing softly like a viral stargirl moment caught on live TV.

name: DRIFT RACING
prompt: Tokyo night street racing — cars drift and donut around the character, low angles and 35mm film grain, blockbuster reveal.

name: CGI BREAKDOWN
prompt: CGI breakdown reveal — mesh to beauty pass, each render layer cuts in sequence, turntable camera, ending on the final polished visual

name: FOOTBALL INVADER
prompt: Spectator sprints from the stands, jumps fences, evades security, charges onto the pitch and strikes — all in one continuous telephoto take.

name: SUMMER HAZE
prompt: A dreamy lomo-style home movie — friend handheld-films the person across mountains, lake, and grass fields in 6 hazy pastel shots with light leaks and soft film grain

name: KUNG FU HIT
prompt: Dojo combat CGI — a single sensei strike sends the character recoiling in slow-motion, leaving solid energy copies before a final flash counter ends it.

name: FINAL SERVE
prompt: Mid-2000s broadcast tennis final — match point won, raw exhaustion and emotion, crowd erupting, character waves in close-up.

name: ANDROID ASSEMBLE
prompt: Robot parts fly in from all directions, snapping onto a central core piece by piece — head locks last, camera lands on the final character frame.

name: 3D RENDER
prompt: Clean 3D software reveal — camera orbiting a hyper-detailed character model, fast zooms, rotating lights, mouse clicks only.

name: STORM GIANT
prompt: Cinematic blockbuster opening — a giant emerges from storm clouds, casually deflects a fighter jet with a finger snap. Anamorphic, hyper-real.

name: BLUE DEPTH
prompt: Dark, cold aquarium scene with deep navy lighting, drifting fish, and a dreamy 2000s digital camera aesthetic.

name: ORBITAL PRESENCE
prompt: Cinematic satellite scenes of a subject on Earth — wide orbital shots, cloud-touch simulations, and intimate close-ups blending space scale with human presence.

name: ZOMBIE DANCE
prompt: Post-apocalyptic night street — character sashays through a zombie horde with runway energy, on-camera light, wide moving shot.

name: GOLF MAJOR
prompt: Mid-2000s golf major broadcast — clean 200-yard iron shot drops straight into the hole, crowd erupts, character reacts with quiet disbelief.

name: 2000'S PAPARAZZI
prompt: A retro VHS paparazzi clip — Y2K celebrity in graphic tee and low-rise jeans exits a luxury hotel through a golden revolving door, walks past flashing cameras into a black car.

name: CANDID PAPARAZZI
prompt: A candid K-pop airport paparazzi shot - idol in Y2K streetwear walks

name: RACE TRACK
prompt: Confident selfie walk on a sunlit race track while cars blast past at full speed — hair and clothes whipping violently from every shockwave, camera shaking, all smiles.

name: DROWN IN MUSIC
prompt: A high-contrast B\u0026W person puts on headphones and sways head with eyes closed as 8 vibrant patterned backgrounds rapidly flicker behind them in a mixed-media zine rhythm

name: NIGHTLINE
prompt: A retro polygonal cyberpunk noir character select screen - character in a glossy latex suit takes a boxing guard then draws a knife in a dim sepia-toned alley

name: FREE FALL
prompt: Android free-falls from a cyberpunk skyscraper, body parts snapping together mid-air — mechanical impacts, servo locks, and violent wind.

name: RED CARPET
prompt: A live Korean red carpet broadcast - celebrity in event attire walks and poses for photographers with handheld camerawork, eyes on lens, in a fully in-focus crowd shot

name: NEON CITY
prompt: A retro action game cover render - character in tactical steampunk business outfit on neon-lit wet streets at night with hard cuts, close-ups, and slow circling camera.

name: SOUL FIGHTER
prompt: Claude responded: A retro polygonal fighting game loading screen — character throws martial arts combos in a combat stance against a neon city skyline, silver-blue palette with …A retro polygonal fighting game loading screen — character throws martial arts combos in a combat stance against a neon city skyline

name: TUSCAN YOGA
prompt: A serene yoga session in a sunlit Tuscan landscape with rolling hills and soft golden light

name: APEX HUNTER
prompt: A retro low-poly racing game cover — character rides a silver-white futuristic motorcycle down a night highway, accelerating into blue flames with chrome title and side menu UI

name: IN THE DARK
prompt: An early-2000s polygonal survival-horror loading screen - character with flashlight in a misty night forest

name: RED THREAD
prompt: A dark cinematic game menu — androgynous figure with platinum hair and katana performs a sharp wuxia slash sequence amid red threads,

name: EXIT THE DREAM
prompt: A retro PS1-style survival-horror game screenshot - low-poly character in a haunted mansion with CRT scanlines

name: ENDING FAIRY
prompt: A K-pop ending fairy broadcast shot — idol-style person in a final dance pose, breathing softly and smiling into the camera as confetti slowly falls around them

name: DRAGON FANTASY
prompt: A retro low-poly fantasy RPG scene - character in traditional robes commands a white serpent dragon, lands in a heroic pose with minimal HUD and dreamy lavender palette

name: FAN MEETING
prompt: A K-pop fansign event shot - idol making a cute bunny heart gesture while talking to a fan whose face is out of frame, soft lighting with a zoomed handheld feel

name: NIGHT VISION
prompt: A static night-vision monochrome green shot — person in a leather jacket walks into frame on a dark street, leans into the camera to check it, then walks away into the night

name: OFFICE CCTV
prompt: A degraded overhead office CCTV tape - a worker types alone at night, stares into the camera, then suddenly hurls a CRT monitor through the window with timestamp and tracking glitches

name: RACE WINNER
prompt: A cinematic night race montage on film - driver in a white suit grips the halo to exit the cockpit, climbs out, then lifts off the helmet in slow motion under stadium floodlights
